title: Crunchy Thai Chicken Roast
description: A flavorful and crunchy Central Thai dish, combining the best of roast and dash-friendly ingredients. Perfect for a midnight craving.

ingredients.name: Fish sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a Thai brand for authentic flavor.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a light or dark soy for added flavor.

instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, sesame oil, ginger paste, lime juice, fish sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar.
Place the chicken in a large roasting pan and brush the ginger mixture evenly over the chicken.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
After 30 minutes, sprinkle chopped cilantro, pitted green olives, and roasted peanuts over the chicken.
Return the chicken to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
